pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone eyeing the prize, isn't it? What's your plan if you manage to take some of it home?
Nice to meet you, C. It definitely feels a bit heavy in here. If I win, the money is going straight to my family to make things a bit easier for them; what about you?
I'm in the same boat. I want to look out for the people I care about and get a bit of a fresh start for myself. It's why I'm so determined to win.
I completely understand. It’s a lot of pressure when others are counting on you, but it definitely keeps you focused on the goal.
Exactly. It makes the stakes feel real. Have you had a chance to talk to many of the others yet?
Not yet, you’re actually the first person I’ve really spoken with. Everyone else seems pretty guarded so far.
I noticed that too. It’s hard to be open when there’s so much at stake, but I’m glad we’re at least breaking the ice.
Same here. It definitely helps take the edge off. Hopefully we can both walk away with something for our families.
I really hope so. It makes it a lot easier knowing there’s someone else here with the same priorities.
Definitely. It’s good to know we’re on the same page. I’m going to go try and introduce myself to a few more people before things get started. Good luck!
Good luck with the others, I. I'll see you when the game starts—hope we both make it through.
